worthSeeing.title: Burj Khalifa:
worthSeeing.text: The world's tallest building at 828m, with observation decks above the clouds.

worthSeeing.title: Dubai Mall:
worthSeeing.text: One of the world's largest shopping centres with an aquarium, ice rink, and waterfall.

worthSeeing.title: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque:
worthSeeing.text: Abu Dhabi's breathtaking white marble mosque that can hold 40,000 worshippers.
